name: jstack-audit
description: Top-level JStack command for evidence-bound read-only repository audits.

interface.longDescription: Top-level Codex workflow for bounded repository audits across correctness, security, architecture, maintainability, performance, supply chain, tests, compatibility, data integrity, operations, and applicable launch risk. Task-specific capability routing may strengthen required audit domains while preserving the read-only boundary; findings remain evidence-bound.
defaultPrompt: Run a read-only evidence-bound JStack audit of this repository.
